name: DOCX Content Plan ETL
description: ETL pipeline to import monthly social media content plans from DOCX into Supabase posts table. Extends the existing XLSX import route to also handle DOCX.

structure.layout: alternating: 1 banner table (project header) + 1 data table (15 posts) × 5 projects

field_mapping.caption: col 4
field_mapping.fecha: inferred: first day of target month (see etl_rules)

etl_rules.null_dates: When fecha is absent from source, auto-assign the 1st day of the target month. Month inferred from filename (Spanish month name + 4-digit year). Applies to all future ETL with null dates.
etl_rules.null_enums: When enum-style fields (formato, plataforma, etc.) are absent from source, store 'Pendiente'. Never NULL.
etl_rules.idempotency: On re-import: existing posts for the campaign are deleted and re-inserted. Campaign row is upserted (matched by project_name + client_name).
etl_rules.no_data_loss: ALL fields from source document must be preserved. Adding new columns via migration is preferred over dropping source fields.

migrations.description: ADD COLUMN descripcion TEXT to posts table

implementation.xml_parsing: regex-based extraction of w:tbl → w:tr → w:tc → w:t text nodes
implementation.shared_logic: upsertCampaignAndPosts() — used by both XLSX and DOCX paths
implementation.month_inference: scan filename for Spanish month name + year; fallback to next calendar month
